description: Further enhance the CLI visualizer to properly display the contents of array fields instead of summarizing them, adding extra visual details.

userStories.title: Unpack Array Fields
userStories.description: As a user, I want array fields like 'trail' and 'projectedPositions' properly expanded or visualized as sub-tables so I can understand the tracking history and projections.
acceptanceCriteria: Arrays are no longer just '[Array of X items]'
Complex arrays like trails are displayed as clear sub-tables or formatted text.
